props.ChoiceText: A rival was removed from your path with excellent manners and unimpeachable procedure.
props.ChoiceBio: A politely buried rival taught you that civility is perfectly compatible with malice.

0.TransitionText: Because a politely buried rival taught you that civility is perfectly compatible with malice, office deepened into habit, and authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Guildmaster, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a politely buried rival taught you that civility is perfectly compatible with malice, guild power drew you from workmanship into influence.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a rival buried politely taught you how power prefers ceremony to innocence, guild politics kept tightening around you.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Guildmaster, but you may remain on your current path instead.
